title: NameResolution
description: Output of the resolve-name step: the resolved names and context for a cell type annotation label.

label.description: The original annotation label as given.

resolved_names.description: All names the atlas authors use for this cell type. Includes the original label if no alternative was found.

tissue_context.description: The tissue or organ context as described in the atlas paper.

confidence.description: Confidence in the resolution. 'low' when the label could not be resolved to an author-assigned name.

evidence.description: Brief note on where the name was found (e.g. 'Extended Data Fig. 5 cluster annotations').
